features: VOLUMISING AND CURLING MASCARA: Buildable formula delivers lasting curl and extreme volume.
CURVED BRISTLED BRUSH: The curved, double-sided bristle brush grabs each lash to volumise, lift and set your curl.
NO MORE RACCOON EYES: The formula is smudge-, flake- and transfer-resistant.

HOW TO APPLY: Align inner curve of the wand at the base of your lashes and wiggle mascara wand upwards in a zig-zag motion to coat lashes from root to tip. Use outer curve of the wand to layer additional coats to turn volume and curl all the way up.
VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE: e.l.f. stands with every eye, lip, face, paw and fin. Proudly vegan, e.l.f. is double-certified cruelty-free by Leaping Bunny & PETA.
description: Product Description Your lashes are Incredi-curl! Get big, bold curl and volume with e.l.f. Cosmetics Incredi-curl Mascara. The curved, dense bristle brush catches each lash to curl, volumise, lift and set for major drama and an eye-opening effect. The formula is smudge-, flake- and transfer-resistant for all-day wear. What it is: A buildable volumising and curling mascara that grips lashes for mega curl and long-lasting looks. Why you’ll love it: Buildable formula grips each lash for lasting curl & extreme volume Curved, double-sided bristle brush volumises, lifts & sets curls Smudge-, flake- and transfer-resistant formula Ingredients may change or vary from time to time. Please refer to the packaging of the product received for the list of ingredients in your particular product. Proud to be 100% Vegan, Cruelty-Free and Leaping Bunny Certified. Because kindness is chic. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Propylene Glycol, Synthetic Beeswax, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Copernicia Cerifera (Carnauba) Wax, Glyceryl Stearate, PVP, Polyamide-5, Polyacrylic Acid, Palmitic Acid, PEG-8 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Hydrogenated Polyisob 11000, Nylon 2, PEG-100 Stearate, Acrylates Copolymer, Magnesium Aluminum Silicate, Stearic Acid, Phenoxyethanol, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Aminomethyl Propanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Polyquaternium-10, PEG-90M, Crambe Abyssinica Seed Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Joa) Seed Oil, Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Silica, Tocopherol May Contain: Iron Oxides (CI 77499, CI 77492, CI77491), Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Black 2 (CI 77266) (Nano) Safety Warning For external use only. See more
